title: More Protection Enchantments
description: Adds a few new protection enchantments for some of the damage types that do not have them.
body:
Adds 5 new Protection Enchantments to normally underused damage types. Each goes up to level IV. They can be traded with villagers, or found using an enchantment table.

**Freeze Protection**
Damage Resistances to 
* Freeze Damage

**Lightning Protection**
Damage Resistances to 
* Lightning Damage

**Magic Protection**
Damage Resistances to 
* Magic Damage 
* Indirect Magic Damage

**Quantum Protection**
Damage Resistances to 
* Sonic Boom
* Out of World
* Outside Border
* Bad Respawn Point
* Cramming
* Ender Pearl

**Wither Protection**
Damage Resistances to
* Wither
* Wither Skull

For more information on examples of what damage this negates in the vanilla game see [https://minecraft.wiki/w/Damage_type](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Damage_type)
